page: Google Cloud Platform c4-highmem-48-lssd is a memory-optimized server instance featuring 48 vCPUs and 372 GB of RAM. Powered by an Intel Xeon 6985P-C processor with an x86_64 architecture, it provides 24 physical cores with hyper-threading enabled. The CPU operates at a base speed of 2.3 GHz and includes a 504 MB L3 cache. This instance is equipped with 2951 GB of local NVMe SSD storage across 8 drives, but does not include GPU accelerators.

In benchmark testing, the c4-highmem-48-lssd demonstrates strong performance characteristics. Single-core CPU performance via Geekbench and stress-ng ranks in the top tier and strong tier respectively. Memory bandwidth is highly efficient, with read-only small block cached bandwidth and large block uncached bandwidth both scoring in the top 25 percent. The server also excels in data processing, achieving top-tier results in single-threaded gzip compression and image processing, alongside strong multi-threaded bzip3 decompression.

For database and memory-intensive applications, the instance delivers strong performance, as evidenced by its Passmark database operations score and a Redis SET operations throughput of 88.12 million operations per second. It also achieves top-tier static web serving throughput at 84.03 GB/sec. The inclusion of Advanced Matrix Extensions supports efficient CPU-based machine learning, yielding top-tier text generation speeds of 341.16 tokens per second for small LLM models. This hardware profile offers high resource density, making it a qualitatively cost-effective choice for large-scale databases, in-memory caching, software compilation, and web serving workloads that require high memory-to-vCPU ratios and fast local storage without the added cost of dedicated GPUs.
description: Google Cloud Platform c4-highmem-48-lssd is a memory-optimized server instance designed for resource-intensive workloads. It features 48 vCPUs powered by an Intel Xeon 6985P-C processor running at 2.3 GHz, 372 GB of RAM, and 2951 GB of local NVMe SSD storage. The architecture includes advanced instruction sets such as AVX-512 and Intel AMX, which drive strong performance in data processing and CPU-based machine learning. Benchmarks show top-tier results in single-threaded compression, image processing, and static web serving, alongside strong memory bandwidth and database operations. With a high memory-to-vCPU ratio and fast local storage, this instance is highly suited for in-memory databases, large-scale caching layers, software compilation, and web serving applications.
og_description: Google Cloud Platform c4-highmem-48-lssd is a memory-optimized server with 48 vCPUs, 372 GB RAM, and 2951 GB NVMe SSD storage, delivering top-tier performance for databases and web serving.
meta_description: Google Cloud Platform c4-highmem-48-lssd features 48 vCPUs, 372 GB RAM, and 2951 GB NVMe SSD, optimized for databases and memory-heavy workloads.
tagline: A high-memory server featuring dedicated Intel Xeon processors and fast local NVMe storage for demanding database and data-processing workloads.
bullet_points: 48 vCPUs and 372 GB RAM powered by Intel Xeon 6985P-C processors
2951 GB of high-speed local NVMe SSD storage
Top-tier performance in single-threaded compression and static web serving
Intel AMX support for accelerated CPU-based LLM inference
Optimized for in-memory databases, caching, and software compilation
